nasb.text: Now these are the kings of the land whom the sons of Israel defeated, and whose land they possessed beyond the Jordan toward the sunrise, from the valley of the Arnon as far as Mount Hermon, and all the Arabah to the east:

esv.text: Now these are the kings of the land whom the people of Israel defeated and took possession of their land beyond the Jordan toward the sunrise, from the Valley of the Arnon to Mount Hermon, with all the Arabah eastward:

cnv.text: 以色列人在約旦河東向日出之地擊殺了那地的兩個王，佔領了他們的地，就是從亞嫩谷直到黑門山，和東邊的亞拉巴全境。

ccb.text: 以色列人在约旦河东岸杀死了两个王，占据了他们的领土：自亚嫩谷直到黑门山，包括东面的整个亚拉巴。
